`report_status`: The line `completed = len(done) & {k for k in items}` contains a bug. The bitwise AND operator `&` is not intended for calculating the intersection of sets, and `{k for k in items}` is just `items`. This expression will result in `len(done)` (an integer) bitwise ANDed with an empty set (when `items` is empty) or a non-empty set (when `items` is not empty), which is not the correct way to find the number of completed items that are also in `items`.
